greeting: 👋 Hello! This is a bot for connecting to VPN 🛡️ How to connect: • Click "Buy" and purchase a subscription • Then click "Connect" and follow the instructions
pricing_info: Russian bank cards and cryptocurrency are accepted for payment
no_subscription: ❌ You don't have an active subscription. Click "Buy" to purchase a subscription.
subscription_expiring: ⚠️ Subscription Reminder Your subscription expires on %s. Please renew it to avoid losing access.
trial_activated:
✅ Trial period activated!

Click "Connect" to get your subscription link.
tribute_cancelled:
❌ Your Tribute subscription has been cancelled.

To continue using the VPN, please purchase a new subscription.
topup_disclaimer: 📦 +%d GB of additional traffic ✅ Additional traffic is preserved for the lifetime of your subscription — it is automatically restored after each monthly reset. Click the button below to pay via Tribute:
topup_pending_warning: ⏳ Pending payment You have an unfinished payment. Please wait for it to complete or cancel it.
topup_no_subscription: ❌ You can only buy additional traffic with an active subscription. Purchase a subscription by clicking "Buy".
devices_info: 📱 Device Management 📅 Subscription active until: %s 🔗 Connection link: %s Use this link to connect on new devices. ⚠️ If you want to reset all devices — click the button below.
devices_info_webapp: 📱 Device Management 📅 Subscription active until: %s To connect on new devices, click the "Connect" button below. ⚠️ If you want to reset all devices — click "Reset all devices".
devices_reset_confirm: ⚠️ Confirm reset After reset: • All connected devices will be disconnected • You will receive a new connection link • You will need to reconnect all devices Are you sure?
devices_reset_success: ✅ Devices reset! All old connections have been disconnected. 🔗 New connection link: %s Copy the link and reconnect your devices.
devices_reset_success_webapp: ✅ Devices reset! All old connections have been disconnected. Click "Connect" to open the app and reconnect your devices.
devices_reset_error: ❌ Failed to reset devices. Please contact support.
trial_expiring: ⏰ Trial period ending! Your trial period expires on %s. Purchase a subscription to continue using the VPN without interruption.
traffic_warning: ⚠️ Traffic almost used up Remaining: %.1f GB of %.1f GB Buy additional traffic to keep your access.
devices_list_header: 📱 My Devices 📅 Subscription until: %s Connected: %d devices Tap 🗑️ next to a device to remove it:
devices_empty: 📱 My Devices 📅 Subscription until: %s No connected devices.
devices_error: ❌ Failed to get device list. Please try again later.
subscription_expired: ❌ Your subscription has expired. Click "Buy" to continue.
topup_trial_only:
⚠️ Additional traffic is only available on a paid subscription.

The trial period has a fixed traffic volume.
topup_error: ❌ Failed to create request. Please try again later.
admin_status_active: Access restored! Your VPN is active again. Enjoy!
admin_status_disabled: Access suspended. Your VPN has been temporarily disabled. If this is a mistake, please contact support.
admin_traffic_reset: Traffic reset! Your traffic counter has been reset by an administrator. Full volume is available again.
admin_subscription_extended: Good news! Your subscription has been extended by %d days. Active until: %s
admin_devices_reset: Devices reset! An administrator has reset all your connected devices. Reconnect them again if needed.
admin_topup_increase: Extra traffic granted! An administrator added +%d GB of traffic. New limit: %d GB.
admin_topup_decrease: Traffic limit changed An administrator deducted %d GB of traffic. New limit: %d GB.
admin_trial_enabled: Trial period enabled Your account has been switched to trial mode by an administrator.
admin_trial_disabled: Trial period disabled Your account has been switched to a regular plan by an administrator.
tribute_topup_user_not_found: ❌ Failed to credit traffic: account not found in the panel. Please contact support.
tribute_topup_unlimited: ℹ️ You have an unlimited plan — additional traffic isn't needed. Contact support for a refund.
tribute_topup_not_eligible: ❌ Failed to credit traffic: account is not active. Please contact support.
tribute_topup_success: ✅ Credited +%d GB. Current traffic limit: %d GB.
